name: get_project_issues
description: Retrieve all known vulnerabilities and license issues for a specific monitored project. Returns detailed information about each issue including severity, CVSS score, exploitability, whether a fix is available, the vulnerable dependency path, and remediation guidance. Issues are grouped by type (vuln or license). Use this to audit a project's security posture or generate a vulnerability report.

parameters.name: org_id
parameters.description: The UUID of the Snyk organization that owns the project.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: The UUID of the project. Obtain from the list_projects capability.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Optional filters object. Can include 'severities' (array of 'critical', 'high', 'medium', 'low'), 'types' (array of 'vuln', 'license'), 'ignored' (boolean), 'patched' (boolean).
